(a) A person commits an offense if the person fails to:

(1) register as required by the unified carrier registration plan and agreement; or

(b) An offense under this section is a Class C misdemeanor.

markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 645. Unified Carrier Registration
##### § 645.004 — Criminal Offense

(a) A person commits an offense if the person fails to:

    (1) register as required by the unified carrier registration plan and agreement; or

    (2) submit information and documents as required by the unified carrier registration plan and agreement.

(b) An offense under this section is a Class C misdemeanor.

(c) Each day a violation occurs is a separate offense under this section.

*Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 703 (H.B.3254), Sec. 16, eff. January 1, 2018.*
